title: Product Marketing Manager 80-100%
required_skills: 5+ years Product Marketing or related role
bonus_skills: Customer Experience Marketing or Sales background
matched_skills: 4+ years product marketing across B2B sectors
Storytelling via demo scripts sales enablement content strategy
Hands-on execution (4 product launches 4.6M CNY contracts)
missing_skills: German at professional working proficiency (CV B1+, JD says big plus)
core_responsibilities: Evolve and drive positioning and offering with CPO and VP Marketing
Plan and execute communication for product releases and new features
Own and continuously improve website product messaging
Own and manage key marketing channels for product communication
Work closely with Marketing Branding Sales CS and Product for message consistency
Monitor competitors and industry trends deliver monthly report and GTM recommendations
Optimize and scale marketing processes through automation and continuous improvement
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B GTM ownership and quantified product launch results (4.6M CNY contracts)
Cross-functional coordination across Product Marketing Sales Engineering
Competitive intelligence and monthly reporting capabilities
Storytelling via demo scripts sales enablement and content strategy
German B1+ as active working language (progressing)
Agile PMO discipline as evidence of prioritization under changing requirements
International B2B breadth FinTech IoT shipping as versatile GTM perspective
